news.title: Wien hat seine erste Kölsch-Bar - DiePresse.com
news.summary:

Vienna now has its first Kölsch bar, bringing the traditional German beer culture from Cologne to Austria's capital. This new establishment offers visitors and locals an authentic experience with Kölsch, the light lager beer traditionally served in Cologne, along with likely German/Rhineland cuisine and atmosphere. For food and drink enthusiasts visiting Vienna, this spot provides a unique dining option that adds to the city's diverse international restaurant scene.
